summary.judgment: ViDove refinement is runnable and clearly improves Chinese transcript quality over raw Whisper-base output on both news and Bilibili tutorial samples.

corrections.raw: 至今臨海警方近日倒破
corrections.refined: 浙江临海警方近日捣毁

notes: Refined transcript is much more readable than raw Whisper-base output.
Refinement performs semantic cleanup, not just character-level correction.
Gain transfers into a real Bilibili tutorial clip.
Refined transcript is cleaner and better segmented for downstream understanding.
